title: Message/set update applies patch fields in separate writes without a transaction
description: message_set update loop (jmap.rs) iterates patch paths and calls store methods (edit_message_body, set_message_reaction, soft_delete_message, read_message) one at a time with no enclosing transaction; if a later patch path fails after an earlier one succeeds, the earlier write is committed but the later is not, leaving the message in a partial state that violates RFC 8620 §7.1 atomicity — analogous to the contact_set bug fixed in a prior round but not yet fixed for messages
